title: The unlikely story of how a tiny bat forever linked Micron with Destiny USA’s founder
summary: Micron Technology's proposed flagship U.S. chipmaking facility in Clay, NY triggered environmental discovery of an Indiana bat maternity roost on the site. The finding links the major economic development project to endangered species protections and potential regulatory implications for the City's innovation infrastructure ambitions.

political_signal.description: Environmental discovery during site evaluation for major corporate investment creates regulatory scrutiny; tension between economic development priority and federal endangered species protections likely to emerge
